Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
